raw_text: The delivery was excellent. The delivery partner was polite, professional, and delivered my order on time. The package was handled carefully and arrived in perfect condition. I had a smooth and hassle-free experience. Thank you for the great service!🤝👍🥰
"Excellent service! Orders are delivered very quickly and the app is easy to use. Fresh products, good offers, and reliable delivery every time. Highly recommended!"

there are issues while placing order the problem that I face everytime that my amount is deducted but order didn't placed and if I switch the payment from cash on delivery to online then payment is not successful amount deducted but not paid to the delivery guy
best way to get a things easily... the only thing I don't like is that free delivery is only available for more than 150 rs. items.... please allow that at cheaper things as well

Shopping with blinkit is a great experience. The only suggestion is blinkit should recollect the paper bags from the customers and give them points which can they redeem in next shopping. The collected bags can be reused by blinkit. It will save their packing expenses ultimately saving the trees. so it will be a fun way to shop without any guilt for customers. Hope you will consider our suggestion and act accordingly. Mayuri Giri from- Jalgaon

this app is very nice and this is very fast delivery giving to customers and I also like the one more thing that they have their own ambulance which is very nice facility they didn't take any charges which is very nice I like it.

first time I trying to order but shows almost every payment that it is unavailable at this time so i added money in blinkit wallet but since one day I'm unable to use it and their is neither way to talk to their customer care that's just like a scam
Honestly, don't have any negative reviews till now. App always runs smooth and most of my orders are delivered within 15 minutes.

I asked for the refund or replacement but the customer support didn't even bother to ask what is the issue and gave the coupon and put extra charges where once I have already ordered this not acceptable
My Blinkit experience is always very good. Good packaging, fast delivery and the delivery man's behaviour is always good. My last minute option for electronics and cloths/household also👍👍👍👍👍

after paying delivery charge and handling fee I still get my order in bad condition many times ice cream is melted product were near to expiry, costumer must be informed that this particular product is near to expiry then the customer will decide if they want it or not

19 Mins = 1hr 9 Mins. Garbage Packing. Received Water Pouch instead of Ice Cubes. 20% of items are always missing every Order. Refund is only to the wallet so that you are forced to place order or forget the money. Customer Support asks Proof that entire Delivery is missing. Absolute Mockery of Handling Charges. The said free BB bag never comes or comes in condition that it's of no use.

blinkit service is and the help support executives are froud. i ordereda heat water beg I said I am having pain and this was the reason I ordered it immediately but this is of no use without charger and you guyzz also taking time. I don't want refund but atleast send the item with charger in exchange and let me use the product..... I told everything and share videos well but they don't resolve my problem also the closed my chat again and again but they don't help me ..... I am so 😞disappointed
Excellent service! Super quick delivery, great discounts, and everything arrived in perfect condition. Blinkit makes shopping fast and hassle-free.

I just tried to placed an order, money got deducted but order still not placed and it's showing now as currently unavailable due to excess demand. Now I'm left with no clue and no way to reach out to an executive person.

Nice trick! Everytime I open this app there is a high demand surge! 🙂 First it was free delivery above 100 rupees, then it became 150 now it is free delivery above 199. Then out of nowhere a handling charge came. First few orders there were no handling charge, then handling charge was 8, then 10 now it is 12. Now it is high demand surge and have to order above 499. Nice trick! I live right next to a blinkit hub..I can see how high demand they have.
After some orders, it increases the minimum amount of the order. some time the product expiry date is too short.

sound is not that much good than expected buds are not even tuned and Gaming mode is worst than expected no Enc mode as I was expecting that buds will be value for money but these buds are not so good in voice I hav used these buds for calls also but as I have written that buds are totally waste of money I will highly recommend not to buy these buds company should take care of the( HIGHLY RECOMMEND NOT TO BUY) they are committing false statments on these buds...

This is a great app with excellent service. I have been using it for a long time; since I live on the fourth floor, I order everything online, and I have never faced any issues so far. This app is very helpful for me. Thanks, Blinkit :-)

their return and replacement policies are hopeless. Customer care gives useless answer for exchange of a simple charging cable which has wrong connectors. such a simple task and they give stupid reasons of no replacement
